appraisal_events.evidence: « Senti est très juste pour un auteur aussi odorant… » (interruption ironique) … « Vous avez tort, … Wagner avait du génie. Lohengrin est un chef‑d'œuvre… »
appraisal_events.explanation: The duchess interrupts and then publicly corrects the duke on his literary and musical judgments, imposing her discernment and contradicting him in front of others.

status_effects.explanation: Her discursive authority is diminished by the direct correction ('You are wrong') and her display of 'old-fashioned' tastes.
She gains local rhetorical position by demonstrating wit and aesthetic competence in front of the duke.
